evals.name: Detect UIBackgroundModes audio blocker
evals.prompt: Run App Store pre-check on this Flutter project

files.ios/Runner/Info.plist:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
	<key>UIBackgroundModes</key>
	<array>
		<string>audio</string>
		<string>fetch</string>
	</array>
	<key>NSCameraUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Take photos for your daily activities</string>
</dict>
</plist>

expectations: Must flag UIBackgroundModes 'audio' as a BLOCKER
Should explain that audio mode is only for streaming apps
Should recommend removing audio from UIBackgroundModes

evals.name: Detect generic privacy purpose strings
evals.prompt: Check this app for App Store compliance issues

files.ios/Runner/Info.plist:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
	<key>NSCameraUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Camera access</string>
	<key>NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription</key>
	<string>This app needs photo access</string>
</dict>
</plist>

expectations: Should flag camera description as too short/generic
Should flag photo library description as too generic
Should recommend adding specific usage examples
Should reference Guideline 5.1.1

evals.name: Detect placeholder text in purpose strings

files.ios/Runner/Info.plist:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
	<key>NSCameraUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Example: You should fill this in</string>
	<key>NSMicrophoneUsageDescription</key>
	<string>TODO: Add description</string>
</dict>
</plist>

expectations: Must flag both descriptions as BLOCKERS
Should identify placeholder text patterns (TODO, Example)
Should not pass these as warnings - they're definite blockers

evals.name: Detect NSAllowsArbitraryLoads enabled

files.ios/Runner/Info.plist:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
	<key>NSCameraUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Take photos of safety inspection items to attach to your report</string>
	<key>NSAppTransportSecurity</key>
	<dict>
		<key>NSAllowsArbitraryLoads</key>
		<true/>
	</dict>
</dict>
</plist>

expectations: Should flag NSAllowsArbitraryLoads as WARNING
Should explain this disables HTTPS enforcement
Should recommend removing or using exception domains instead
Camera description should pass — it's specific enough

Should detect createUser/signIn as account creation
Should reference Guideline 5.1.1(v)
Should explain in-app deletion requirement

evals.name: Detect problematic Flutter version 3.24.3
evals.prompt: Check this Flutter app for iOS submission

files.ios/Runner/Info.plist:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
	<key>NSCameraUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Take photos of items to add to your inventory list</string>
</dict>
</plist>
files.pubspec.yaml:
name: test_app
version: 1.0.0
environment:
  sdk: '>=3.5.0 <4.0.0'
  flutter: 3.24.3

expectations: Must flag Flutter 3.24.3 as BLOCKER
Should explain this version uses non-public iOS APIs
Should reference Guideline 2.5.1
Should recommend upgrading to 3.24.5+

evals.name: Detect UIBackgroundModes voip without VoIP feature

files.ios/Runner/Info.plist:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
	<key>UIBackgroundModes</key>
	<array>
		<string>voip</string>
		<string>remote-notification</string>
	</array>
	<key>NSCameraUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Capture photos of equipment during safety inspections</string>
</dict>
</plist>

expectations: Must flag UIBackgroundModes 'voip' as BLOCKER
Should explain voip mode is only for VoIP/calling apps
remote-notification should be fine

evals.name: Pass a properly configured iOS app

files.ios/Runner/Info.plist:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
	<key>CFBundleIdentifier</key>
	<string>com.example.app</string>
	<key>CFBundleShortVersionString</key>
	<string>1.0.0</string>
	<key>CFBundleVersion</key>
	<string>1</string>
	<key>UIBackgroundModes</key>
	<array>
		<string>remote-notification</string>
	</array>
	<key>NSCameraUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Take photos to attach to your daily activity reports and share with caregivers in the ShowMyDay app</string>
	<key>NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Select existing photos from your library to add to activity reports and personalize your profile picture</string>
	<key>NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Show your current location on the map to find nearby safety inspection sites</string>
</dict>
</plist>

expectations: Should pass all automated checks with no blockers
Privacy strings are specific — should pass
UIBackgroundModes only has remote-notification — should pass
Account deletion present — should pass
Privacy policy URL found — should pass
Should show App Store Connect manual checklist
Should indicate ready for submission pending manual checks

evals.name: Detect multiple iOS issues in one app
evals.prompt: Run full App Store precheck on this Flutter project

files.ios/Runner/Info.plist:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
<plist version="1.0">
<dict>
	<key>UIBackgroundModes</key>
	<array>
		<string>audio</string>
	</array>
	<key>NSCameraUsageDescription</key>
	<string>Camera</string>
	<key>NSMicrophoneUsageDescription</key>
	<string>PLACEHOLDER: update this</string>
	<key>NSAppTransportSecurity</key>
	<dict>
		<key>NSAllowsArbitraryLoads</key>
		<true/>
	</dict>
</dict>
</plist>

expectations: Should flag UIBackgroundModes audio as BLOCKER
Should flag camera description 'Camera' as too short/generic
Should flag microphone description as BLOCKER — placeholder text
Should flag NSAllowsArbitraryLoads as WARNING
Should flag missing account deletion as BLOCKER
Should flag missing restore purchases as BLOCKER
Should show multiple blockers in summary — NOT READY

evals.name: Handle Expo project without iOS prebuild
evals.prompt: Run iOS precheck on my Expo app
expectations: Should detect Expo project without prebuild
Should check app.json for ios.bundleIdentifier — should pass
Should check infoPlist for privacy strings — camera description should pass
Should check UIBackgroundModes from infoPlist — remote-notification is fine
Should suggest running npx expo prebuild for complete native checks

evals.name: Detect bad privacy strings in Expo app.json
evals.prompt: Check Expo app for App Store issues
expectations: Should flag camera description as too short/generic from app.json
Should flag location description as too short/generic from app.json
Should flag UIBackgroundModes audio as BLOCKER from app.json
Should reference Guideline 5.1.1 for privacy strings
Should reference Guideline 2.5.4 for background modes

evals.name: Detect generic Expo plugin permission strings that override infoPlist
evals.prompt: Run iOS precheck on my Expo app
expectations: Must flag expo-camera cameraPermission as BLOCKER — generic $(PRODUCT_NAME) pattern
Must flag expo-camera microphonePermission as BLOCKER — generic $(PRODUCT_NAME) pattern
Must flag expo-image-picker photosPermission as BLOCKER — mentions 'friends' (wrong context)
Must flag expo-location permission as BLOCKER — generic $(PRODUCT_NAME) pattern
Should explain plugin configs override infoPlist values
Good infoPlist strings should NOT prevent flagging bad plugin strings

evals.name: Detect Always location permission with foreground-only location code
evals.prompt: Check this Expo app for App Store compliance
expectations: Must flag UIBackgroundModes 'location' as BLOCKER — no background location code found
Must flag foreground-only code with Always location permission as BLOCKER
Should recommend removing 'location' from UIBackgroundModes
Should recommend changing to locationWhenInUsePermission
Should recommend removing NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription and NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescription

evals.name: Detect B2B/enterprise distribution signals
evals.prompt: Run iOS precheck on this safety management app
expectations: Should flag B2B/enterprise patterns as WARNING
Should detect enterprise login, admin panel, invite-only, and role-based patterns
Should recommend preparing Guideline 3.2 response for Apple
Should list the 5 questions Apple may ask about distribution
Should NOT be a blocker — just a warning to prepare
